description.en: A list of strings representing the file suffixes for non-optimized bytecode modules. Added in version 3.3. Deprecated since version 3.5: Use BYTECODE_SUFFIXES instead.

excerpt.es: A list of strings representing the file suffixes for non-optimized bytecode modules. Added in version 3.3. Deprecated since version 3.5: Use BYTECODE_SUFFIXES instead.
excerpt.en: A list of strings representing the file suffixes for non-optimized bytecode modules. Added in version 3.3. Deprecated since version 3.5: Use BYTECODE_SUFFIXES instead.

description.en: Decode the given bytes representing source code and return it as a string with universal newlines (as required by importlib.abc.InspectLoader.get_source()). Added in version 3.4.

excerpt.es: Decode the given bytes representing source code and return it as a string with universal newlines (as required by importlib.abc.InspectLoader.get_source()). Added in version 3.4.
